title: Warmly Charred Portuguese Fish Bowl
description: A charred and silky Portuguese dish featuring allspice, served in a dolsot stone bowl, perfect for a solo dinner
instructions: Preheat the dolsot stone bowl in the oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes
Season the cod fillet with salt, black pepper, and allspice
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the cod fillet for 2-3 minutes on each side
Transfer the cod fillet to the preheated dolsot stone bowl
Drizzle the lemon juice and dum over the cod fillet
Sprinkle the minced garlic and chopped parsley over the top
Return the dolsot stone bowl to the oven and cook for an additional 5 minutes
Remove the dolsot stone bowl from the oven and let it cool for a minute or two
Serve the warmly charred Portuguese fish bowl immediately
